element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Foundational firing mechanic before any upgrades
Players learn damage absorption before facing sustained fire patterns
Expands attack surface; unlocks dual-button fire management
Increases firepower complexity; some require manual activation
Exponential cost scaling teaches resource management strategy

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Mid-campaign when attempting high-tier weapon combos
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Forces tradeoff decisions: raw power vs. sustainability
Teaches spatial navigation around environmental hazards
Concentrated pattern recognition; tests weapon-specific strategies
Optional lore; some require specific enemy destruction sequences
Unlocks hidden levels and difficulty-gated content on replays
Removes visibility cues; forces prediction and memory of enemy patterns

element_introduction_order.element: Hidden difficulty tiers (Impossible/Suicide/Lord of the Game)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Expert-only challenge scaling; accessed via completion passwords

typical_relief_triggers: Safe vertical scroll periods with sparse enemy fire
typical_tension_triggers: Boss entrance and attack pattern initiation
Fixed obstacle fields requiring precise navigation
Resource scarcity (low shields, high upcoming armor cost)
Exponential weapon upgrade costs forcing strategy recalculation
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Cyclical intensity: forced forward vertical movement maintains constant threat presence; tension ebbs during shop/customization phases and crests at boss battles and obstacle-dense segments. Arcade mode sustains higher baseline tension via pickup-dependent upgrades; story mode offers greater agency and relief through preparation phases.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Message cubes behind specific enemy destructions; hidden difficulty levels gated by hard-mode completion; alternate story branches provide path choice at narrative junctures
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Hard difficulty hidden levels contain unique powerups and upgrades; hidden ships unlocked via completion passwords; Lord of the Game and Suicide modes accessible only through code-based activation

difficulty_curve.early_game: Foundational weapon and shield mechanics introduced with moderate enemy density; player learns basic dodging and firing patterns without overwhelming fire complexity
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Weapon customization economy becomes critical; generator power budgets force strategic choices; boss encounters introduce sustained pattern recognition; obstacle density increases
difficulty_curve.late_game: Multi-system mastery required: rear weapon timing, sidekick coordination, resource optimization, and boss-specific tactics; story branches offer alternate campaign paths; hard mode content becomes available with enhanced enemy durability and bullet rates
notable_spikes: First major boss encounter (tests foundational combat mechanics)
Transition to multi-weapon management (rear gun + sidekick coordination)
Hard difficulty encounters with line-of-sight masking removal
Hidden difficulty tiers (Impossible, Suicide, Lord of the Game) - extreme scaling

notable_level_patterns.description: Fixed and indestructible environmental obstacles increase in density and complexity; forces navigation skill development parallel to combat skill
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Not specified in source; pattern documented as recurring mechanic

notable_level_patterns.description: Each major campaign section culminates in a boss encounter; pattern teaches concentrated application of current weapon/upgrade loadout
Campaign progression punctuated by shops offering variable inventory; allows strategy recalibration and relief from forward-scroll tension
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Between-level progression; differs across campaign branches

notable_level_patterns.description: Flying enemies, fixed stationary enemies, and rail-bound enemies introduced in mixed compositions; forces adaptive dodging and firing patterns
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Distributed across all difficulty levels; density increases in hard mode

notable_level_patterns.description: Story branches and hard-difficulty-exclusive levels provide replay incentive; accessed by specific narrative choices or difficulty selection
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Hidden levels accessible only on hard difficulty; story paths at predetermined branching points
